name: io.github.calypso-so/multimodal-rag-mcp-server
title: Calypso Multimodal RAG MCP
description: Calypso multimodal RAG for grounded answers from docs, images, charts, and knowledge.

environmentVariables.name: CALYPSO_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Calypso API key used to access the Calypso Responses API.

environmentVariables.name: CALYPSO_API_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional Calypso-compatible API base URL. Defaults to https://api.calypso.so/v1.
